articles.summary: Name: Padmore & Barnes x Realtree Original x Albino & Preto Sport BootColorway: CamoSKU: TBCMSRP: TBCRelease Date: June 24Where to Buy: Albino & PretoAlbino & Preto has unveiled a four-brand collaboration with Padmore & Barnes, Realtree Original, and RCarryall, reinterpreting the Padmore & Barnes Sport Boot through an outdoor utility lens and pairing it with a special edition tote bag series from cult Southern California bag maker RCarryall.The Sport Boot's place in the Padmore & Barnes catalog has always rested on a particular tension: a silhouette with genuine craft heritage, worn most often in contexts that have little to do with the terrain it was built to handle. articles.title: Nike's Air Force 1 Low "Patent Denim" Seals Coastal Blue Denim Beneath a Glossy Finish
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Force 1 Low “Patent Denim”Colorway: Coastal Blue/Natural-Flax-Coastal BlueSKU: IM5757-400MSRP: TBCRelease Date: Summer 2026Nike is set to release the Air Force 1 Low "Patent Denim," applying a glossy patent finish over a Coastal Blue denim upper in a construction that keeps the fabric's weave and tonal variation visible beneath the gloss.The material logic here is the central point of interest. Rather than replacing denim with patent leather or treating them as separate design elements, the "Patent Denim" build layers the gloss directly over the fabric, allowing the denim's natural weave and the darker shading around the heel and side panels to show through. The result reads differently from a standard patent leather AF1 because the surface has tonal variation built into it,

articles.summary: Name: Nike Total 90 “White/Black”Colorway: TBCSKU: IO2388-100MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike is reportedly set to release the Total 90 "White/Black," bringing the pack's all-over hexagonal quilted leather upper to its most stripped-back colorway. The “White/Black” build retains the asymmetrical lacing and flat rubber sole of the lifestyle Total 90 series, while the clean two-tone finish gives the shoe's soccer ball-mimicking stitch pattern its clearest canvasThe construction concept driving the Soccer Ball pack is arguably easier to read on the model than on any other colorway in the lineup. articles.title: New Arrivals From HBX: adidas Originals
articles.summary: Brand Information: Adidas Originals is the heritage line of the German activewear brand adidas. The line specializes in lifestyle sneakers and streetwear apparel that seamlessly fuses fashion with function. A classic meets modern amalgamation that has already produced iconic models such as the NMD_R1, Stan Smith, Forum Low, Ultraboost, and Superstar, alongside a slew of successful collaborations with cultural icons and influential brands like Pharrell Williams, Alexander Wang, Palace, Kendall Jenner and more. articles.title: Our Inside Look at the Ultimate Sneaker Archive and World Cup Boot Test Inside New Balance HQ
articles.summary: New Balance is no longer just the king of premium lifestyle runners but now also the absolute epicenter of global soccer and street culture. During an exclusive experience in Boston, the brand opened its doors to us for an immersive, behind-the-scenes look into the future of the beautiful game. Walking through the campus, the sheer scale of the brand’s athletic ambition becomes instantly clear. High-performance engineering and high-fashion aesthetics collide, seeing this world-class setup prove that the brand's current cultural foothold is meticulously calculated.The real magic happens where data meets design. articles.title: BRICS Trade Ties Could Boost India’s Textile and Apparel Exports
articles.summary: India’s textile and apparel exports to BRICS countries increased to Rs 36,535 crore (US$3.87 billion) in FY2024 before moderating to Rs 34,647 crore (US$3.67 billion) in FY2025. articles.title: Tracing the Craftsmanship at the Heart of MIZUNO Through the Words of Mizuno Global Brand Ambassador Mason Mount
articles.summary: Japanese sporting goods icon MIZUNO has unveiled the MORELIA LS — a lifestyle silhouette that carries the DNA of the MORELIA, one of the brand's most beloved football boot lineages.Built on the foundation of the MORELIA GM IN, an indoor football shoe from the mid-2000s, the MORELIA LS has been reimagined for modern life while preserving the details that made the original iconic: the signature flap tongue, precise stitchwork, and refined heel construction. The result is a shoe that bridges football heritage and street sensibility.The slim-soled silhouette remains sharp and true to its roots, while MIZUNO's proprietary cushioning technologies — MIZUNO ENERZY and MIZUNO WAVE — have been integrated for enhanced comfort underfoot.
